title: list-tags is broken for skopeo 0.1.41
body:
`skopeo version 0.1.41`
trying to use 
```
 skopeo list-tags  --creds xxxx:yyyy docker://registry.upbound.io/crossplane/stack-minimal-gcp
```
and getting `No help topic for 'list-tags'`

Also can reproduce it for any other image
for example
```
skopeo list-tags  docker://docker.io/hashicorp/terraform
No help topic for 'list-tags'
```

comments.body: Yes, `skopeo list-tags` was added after 0.1.41 and there hasn’t been a release since.
Are we waiting for the next version of containers/image?  and then can do a release?

thank you for explanation. 
I looked into `0.1.41` release date and date when PR https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/716 was merged and I thought that it made it into the release even I didn't find it in Release notes and assumed that error message `No help topic for 'list-tags'` was indicator of some bug
so I am looking forward to the next release.
